positive: A detailed scientific illustration of various exotic tropical flora, including bioluminescent orchids and jungle ferns. Intricate botanical drawing style, engraved on parchment, labeled with elegant cursive text placeholders. Earth tones, academic, natural history plate. --ar 2:3
